search.query: | inputlookup cisco_intersight_asset_targets | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | table AccountMoid, account_name | dedup AccountMoid, account_name

input.choice: Exclude servers not associated to Server Profiles

chart.title: Numbers of Servers by Server Types

search.query: | inputlookup cisco_intersight_compute_physicalsummaries | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | dedup Moid | search AccountMoid="$in_acc$" | eval ServerType=case(SourceObjectType="compute.RackUnit", "Rack Servers", true(), "Blade Servers") | rename Moid as Server_Moid | join type=left Server_Moid [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_server_profiles | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename AssignedServer.Moid as Server_Moid | table Name, Server_Moid | rename Name as Server_Profile] | eval server_prof_cond="$srvprof$" | search (server_prof_cond="include") OR (server_prof_cond="exclude" AND Server_Profile!="") | stats count by ServerType | eval ServerType=ServerType." (".count.")"

chart.title: Numbers of Servers by Management Mode

search.query: | inputlookup cisco_intersight_compute_physicalsummaries | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | dedup Moid | search AccountMoid="$in_acc$" | eval ServerType=case(SourceObjectType="compute.RackUnit", "Rack Servers", true(), "Blade Servers") | rename Moid as Server_Moid | join type=left Server_Moid [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_server_profiles | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename AssignedServer.Moid as Server_Moid | table Name, Server_Moid | rename Name as Server_Profile] | eval server_prof_cond="$srvprof$" | search (server_prof_cond="include") OR (server_prof_cond="exclude" AND Server_Profile!="") | eval owners_expand='Owners.Owners' | mvexpand owners_expand | where owners_expand != AccountMoid | join type=left owners_expand [ | inputlookup cisco_intersight_asset_targets | rename RegisteredDevice.Moid as owners_expand, Moid as TargetMoid | table TargetType, TargetMoid, owners_expand ] | where isnotnull(TargetType) | dedup Server_Moid | eval TargetType=case(TargetType="UCSFIISM", "IMM", TargetType="UCSXECMC", "Unified Edge", true(), "Standalone") | stats count by TargetType | eval TargetType=TargetType." (".count.")"

| inputlookup cisco_intersight_asset_targets | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | search AccountMoid="$in_acc$" | eval id=AccountMoid, label=account_name, parentid="" | dedup id | eval servermod=case(match("$server_mode$", "^Unified"), "Unified Edge", match("$server_mode$", "^Standalone"), "Standalone Servers", match("$server_mode$", "^IMM"), "Intersight Managed Domains", true(), "") | table id, label, parentid, servermod | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_asset_targets | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | search AccountMoid="$in_acc$" | eval label=case(TargetType="UCSFIISM", "Intersight Managed Domains", TargetType="UCSXECMC", "Unified Edge", 1=1, "Standalone Servers"), parentid=AccountMoid, iconFolder="sitemap" | eval servermod=case(match("$server_mode$", "^Standalone"), "Standalone Servers", match("$server_mode$", "^IMM"), "Intersight Managed Domains", true(), "") | where match(label, "^".servermod) | eval id=label."_".AccountMoid | dedup id | eval servermod=label | table id, label, parentid, iconFolder, servermod] | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_asset_targets | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | search AccountMoid="$in_acc$" | rename "RegisteredDevice.Moid" as rd_moid | search TargetType = "UCSFIISM" | eval id=rd_moid, label=Name, target_type="Intersight Managed Domains" | eval parentid=target_type. "_" . AccountMoid, iconFolder="project-diagram" | dedup id | eval servermod=target_type | table id, label, parentid, iconFolder, servermod] | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_asset_targets | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | search AccountMoid="$in_acc$" | rename "RegisteredDevice.Moid" as rd_moid | search TargetType="UCSXECMC" | eval id=rd_moid, label=Name, target_type="Unified Edge" | eval parentid="Unified Edge_" . AccountMoid, iconFolder="project-diagram" | dedup id | eval servermod=target_type | table id, label, parentid, iconFolder, servermod] | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_network_elements | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | search AccountMoid="$in_acc$" | rename "RegisteredDevice.Moid" as rd_moid, "Owners.Owners" as owners | table rd_moid, AccountMoid, owners, Model, rd_dhn, ManagementMode | eval owners=mvindex(owners,1) | eval inventory_label=case(match(Model, "^UCSXE"), "Edge Chassis Management Controllers (eCMCs)", true(), "Fabric Interconnects") | eval id=((owners . "_FI_") . AccountMoid), label=inventory_label, parentid=owners, iconFolder="teeth" | dedup id | eval servermod=case(ManagementMode="IntersightStandalone", "Intersight Standalone Servers", ManagementMode="Intersight", "Intersight Managed Domains", true(), "") | table id, label, parentid, iconFolder, servermod] | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_network_elements | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | search AccountMoid="$in_acc$" | rename "RegisteredDevice.Moid" as rd_moid, "Owners.Owners" as owners, "RegisteredDevice.DeviceHostname" as rd_dhn | table rd_moid, AccountMoid, owners, Model, rd_dhn, Moid, SwitchId, ManagementMode | eval owners=mvindex(owners,1) | eval inventory_label=case(match(Model, "^UCSXE"), " eCMC-", true(), " FI-") | eval id=("FFI_" . Moid), label=((rd_dhn . inventory_label) . SwitchId), parentid=((owners . "_FI_") . AccountMoid), iconDoc="teeth" | dedup id | eval servermod=case(ManagementMode="IntersightStandalone", "Intersight Standalone Servers", ManagementMode="Intersight", "Intersight Managed Domains", true(), "") | table id, label, parentid, iconDoc, servermod | sort label] | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_equipment_chasses | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | search AccountMoid="$in_acc$" | rename "RegisteredDevice.Moid" as rd_moid, "Owners.Owners" as owners | table rd_moid, AccountMoid, owners, ManagementMode, Model | eval owners=mvindex(owners,1) | eval id=((owners . "_Chassis_") . AccountMoid), label="Chassis", parentid=owners, iconFolder="server" | dedup id | eval servermod=case(match(Model, "^UCSXE"), "Unified Edge", ManagementMode="IntersightStandalone", "Standalone Servers", ManagementMode="Intersight", "Intersight Managed Domains", true(), "") | table id, label, parentid, iconFolder, servermod] | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_equipment_chasses | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | search AccountMoid="$in_acc$" | rename "RegisteredDevice.Moid" as rd_moid, "Owners.Owners" as owners | table rd_moid, AccountMoid, owners, Name, Moid, ManagementMode, Model | eval owners=mvindex(owners,1) | eval id=("CChassis_" . Moid), label=Name, parentid=((owners . "_Chassis_") . AccountMoid), iconFolder="server" | dedup id | eval servermod=case(match(Model, "^UCSXE"), "Unified Edge", ManagementMode="IntersightStandalone", "Standalone Servers", ManagementMode="Intersight", "Intersight Managed Domains", true(), "") | table id, label, parentid, iconFolder, servermod] | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_compute_physicalsummaries | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | search AccountMoid="$in_acc$" | search ManagementMode != "IntersightStandalone" AND SourceObjectType="compute.RackUnit" | rename "RegisteredDevice.Moid" as rd_moid, "Owners.Owners" as owners | table rd_moid, AccountMoid, owners, ManagementMode, SourceObjectType, Model | eval owners=mvindex(owners,1) | eval id=((owners . "_RackServers_") . AccountMoid), label="Rack Servers", parentid=owners, iconFolder="mobile" | dedup id | eval servertyptoken=case(match("$server_typ$", "^Rack"), "compute.RackUnit", match("$server_typ$", "^Blade"), "compute.Blade", true(), "") | where match(SourceObjectType, "".servertyptoken) | eval servermod=case(match(Model, "^UCSXE"), "Unified Edge", ManagementMode="IntersightStandalone", "Standalone Servers", ManagementMode="Intersight", "Intersight Managed Domains", true(), "") | table id, label, parentid, iconFolder, servermod, SourceObjectType, servertyptoken] | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_compute_physicalsummaries | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | search AccountMoid="$in_acc$" | rename "RegisteredDevice.Moid" as rd_moid, "Owners.Owners" as owners, Parent.Moid as parent_moid | table rd_moid, AccountMoid, owners, Name, Moid , ManagementMode, SourceObjectType, parent_moid, Model | eval owners=mvindex(owners,1) | rename Moid as Server_Moid | join type=left Server_Moid [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_server_profiles | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename AssignedServer.Moid as Server_Moid | table Name, Server_Moid | rename Name as Server_Profile] | eval server_prof_cond="$srvprof$" | search (server_prof_cond="include") OR (server_prof_cond="exclude" AND Server_Profile!="") | eval id=("SServer_".Server_Moid), label=Name, parentid=case(ManagementMode="IntersightStandalone", "Standalone Servers". "_". AccountMoid, SourceObjectType="compute.Blade", "CChassis_".parent_moid, SourceObjectType="compute.RackUnit", ((owners."_RackServers_").AccountMoid)), iconDoc=case(SourceObjectType="compute.Blade", "battery-full", SourceObjectType="compute.RackUnit", "mobile"), parentid_bkp=((owners . "_Servers_") . AccountMoid) | dedup id | eval servertyptoken=case(match("$server_typ$", "^Rack"), "compute.RackUnit", match("$server_typ$", "^Blade"), "compute.Blade", true(), "") | where match(SourceObjectType, "".servertyptoken) | eval servermod=case(match(Model, "^UCSXE"), "Unified Edge", ManagementMode="IntersightStandalone", "Standalone Servers", ManagementMode="Intersight", "Intersight Managed Domains", true(), "") | table id, label, parentid, iconDoc, servermod, SourceObjectType, servertyptoken | sort label] | eval servertoken=case(match("$server_mode$", "^Unified"), "Unified Edge", match("$server_mode$", "^Standalone"), "Standalone Servers", match("$server_mode$", "^IMM"), "Intersight Managed Domains", true(), "") | where match(servermod, "".servertoken)

| inputlookup cisco_intersight_equipment_chasses | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename RegisteredDevice.Moid as rd_moid | where Moid=replace("$chassistok$", "CChassis_", "") | eval id=Moid, label=Name, parentid="", iconFolder="server" | dedup id | table id, label, parentid, iconFolder | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_equipment_chasses | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | where Moid=replace("$chassistok$", "CChassis_", "") | eval id=Moid."_".AccountMoid, label="Properties", parentid=Moid | dedup id | table id, label, parentid ] | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_equipment_chasses | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | where Moid=replace("$chassistok$", "CChassis_", "") | rename AlarmSummary.Critical as ascr | eval id="ASCR_".Moid, label="AlarmSummaryCritical: ".ascr, parentid=Moid."_".AccountMoid | dedup id | table id, label, parentid] | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_equipment_chasses | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | where Moid=replace("$chassistok$", "CChassis_", "") | rename AlarmSummary.Health as ashl | eval id="ASHL_".Moid, label="AlarmSummaryHealth: ".ashl, parentid=Moid."_".AccountMoid | dedup id | table id, label, parentid] | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_equipment_chasses | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | where Moid=replace("$chassistok$", "CChassis_", "") | eval id="OperState_".Moid, label="Operation State: ".case(isnull(OperState) OR OperState="" , "Null", 1=1, OperState), parentid=Moid."_".AccountMoid | dedup id | table id, label, parentid] | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_equipment_chasses | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | where Moid=replace("$chassistok$", "CChassis_", "") | rename OperReason.OperReason as OperReason | eval id="OperReason_".Moid, label="Operation Reason: ".case(isnull(OperReason) OR OperReason="" , "Null", 1=1, OperReason), parentid=Moid."_".AccountMoid | dedup id | table id, label, parentid] | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_equipment_chasses | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | where Moid=replace("$chassistok$", "CChassis_", "") | eval id="ConnPath_".Moid, label="Connection Path: ".ConnectionPath, parentid=Moid."_".AccountMoid | dedup id | table id, label, parentid] | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_equipment_chasses | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | where Moid=replace("$chassistok$", "CChassis_", "") | eval id="ConnStatus_".Moid, label="Connection Status: ".case(isnull(ConnectionStatus) OR ConnectionStatus="" , "Null", 1=1, ConnectionStatus), parentid=Moid."_".AccountMoid | dedup id | table id, label, parentid] | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_storage_physicaldisks | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | eval objid=split("$chassistok$", "_") | eval objid = mvindex(objid, 1) | rename Ancestors.Ancestors.Moid as server_moid | mvexpand server_moid | where server_moid=objid | dedup Moid | stats count as val by server_moid, AccountMoid | eval id="PhysDisk_".server_moid, parentid=server_moid."_".AccountMoid, label="Physical disks: ".val | table id, parentid, label] | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_asset_devicecontractinformations | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename Source.Moid as moid | where moid=replace("$chassistok$", "CChassis_", "") | eval id="CS_".moid, label="Contract Status: ".ContractStatus, parentid=moid."_".AccountMoid | dedup id | table id, label, parentid] | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_asset_devicecontractinformations | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename Source.Moid as moid | where moid=replace("$chassistok$", "CChassis_", "") | eval id="LDOS_".moid, label="Last Date Of Support: ".LastDateOfSupport, parentid=moid."_".AccountMoid | dedup id | table id, label, parentid]

| inputlookup cisco_intersight_compute_physicalsummaries | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | where Moid=replace("$servertok$", "SServer_", "") | eval id=Moid, label=Name, parentid="", iconFolder=case(SourceObjectType="compute.Blade", "battery-full", SourceObjectType="compute.RackUnit", "mobile") | dedup id | table id, label, parentid, iconFolder | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_compute_physicalsummaries | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | where Moid=replace("$servertok$", "SServer_", "") | eval id="Details", label="Details", parentid=Moid | dedup id | table id, label, parentid] | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_compute_physicalsummaries | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | where Moid=replace("$servertok$", "SServer_", "") | eval id="Properties", label="Properties", parentid=Moid | dedup id | table id, label, parentid] | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_compute_physicalsummaries | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | where Moid=replace("$servertok$", "SServer_", "") | eval id="Coverage", label="Coverage", parentid=Moid | dedup id | table id, label, parentid] | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_compute_physicalsummaries | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | where Moid=replace("$servertok$", "SServer_", "") | eval id="HCL", label="HCL", parentid=Moid | dedup id | table id, label, parentid] | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_compute_physicalsummaries | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | where Moid=replace("$servertok$", "SServer_", "") | eval assigned_server=Moid | join type=left assigned_server [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_server_profiles | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | where 'AssignedServer.Moid'=replace("$servertok$", "SServer_", "") | eval assigned_server='AssignedServer.Moid' | eval deploy_status=case(DeployStatus=Complete, 'OK', DeployStatus='None', 'Not Covered', 1=1, DeployStatus) | eval server_profile_name=Name | table DeployStatus, assigned_server, server_profile_name] | eval parentid="Details" | eval label="Health: ".'AlarmSummary.Health'.", Label: ".case(isnull(UserLabel) OR UserLabel="" , "Null", 1=1, UserLabel).", UCS Server Profile: ".case(isnull(server_profile_name) OR server_profile_name="", "Null", 1=1, server_profile_name).", UCS Server Profile Status: ".case(isnull(DeployStatus) OR DeployStatus="", "Null", 1=1, DeployStatus).", Management IP: ".case(isnull(MgmtIpAddress) OR MgmtIpAddress="", "Null", 1=1, MgmtIpAddress).", Serial: ".Serial.", PID: ".Model.", Vendor: ".Vendor.", Revision: ".case(isnull(Revision) OR Revision="" , "Null", 1=1, Revision).", AssetTag: ".case(isnull(AssetTag) OR AssetTag="" , "Null", 1=1, AssetTag).", Management Mode: ".ManagementMode.", Firmware Version: ".Firmware.", Life Cycle: ".Lifecycle | makemv delim=", " label | mvexpand label | eval id="Details_".random() | table id, parentid, label] | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_cond_hclstatuses | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | where 'ManagedObject.Moid'=replace("$servertok$", "SServer_", "") | eval parentid="HCL" | eval status_reason=case(Reason="Incompatible-Server", "The server model is not listed in the HCL.", Reason="Incompatible-Processor", "The server model and processor combination is not listed in HCL.", Reason="Incompatible-Firmware", "The server model, processor and server firmware is not listed in HCL.", Reason="Missing-Os-Info", "The os vendor and version is not listed in HCL with the HW profile.", Reason="Incompatible-Os-Info", "The os vendor and version is not listed in HCL with the HW profile.", Reason="Incompatible-Components", "There is one or more components with 'Not-Validated' status.", Reason="Service-Unavailable", "HCL data service is unavailable at the moment (try again later).", Reason="Compatible", "The server and all its components are validated.", Reason="Not-Evaluated", "The server is not evaluated against the HCL because it is exempted.", 1=1, Reason) | eval label="Status: ".Status.", Server Hardware Status: ".HardwareStatus.", Server Software Status: ".SoftwareStatus.", Server Adapter Compliance: ".ComponentStatus | eval label=case(Status!="Validated", label.", Failure Reason: ".Reason, 1=1, label) | makemv delim=", " label | mvexpand label | eval id="HCL_".random() | table id, label, parentid] | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_compute_physicalsummaries | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | where Moid=replace("$servertok$", "SServer_", "") | eval parentid="Properties" | eval label="Power: ".OperPowerState.", CPUs: ".NumCpus.", Threads: ".NumThreads.", CPU Cores: ".NumCpuCores.", CPU Cores Enabled: ".NumCpuCoresEnabled.", CPU Capacity (GHz): ".CpuCapacity.", Memory Capacity (GiB): ".AvailableMemory.", UUID: ".Uuid.", Adaptors: ".NumAdaptors.", Server Type: ".SourceObjectType | makemv delim=", " label | mvexpand label | eval id="Properties_".random() | table id, parentid, label] | append[| inputlookup cisco_intersight_asset_devicecontractinformations | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | where 'Source.Moid'=replace("$servertok$", "SServer_", "") | eval parentid="Coverage" | eval date_only=mvindex(split(LastDateOfSupport,"T"),0) | eval label="Contract Status: ".ContractStatus.", Contract Status Reason: ".case(isnull(ContractStatusReason) OR ContractStatusReason="" , "Null", 1=1, ContractStatusReason).", Last Date of Support: ".date_only | makemv delim=", " label | mvexpand label | eval id="Coverage_".random() | table id, label, parentid] | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_storage_physicaldisks | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | eval objid=split("$servertok$", "_") | eval objid = mvindex(objid, 1) | rename Ancestors.Ancestors.Moid as server_moid | mvexpand server_moid | where server_moid=objid | dedup Moid | stats count as val | eval id="Properties_".random(), parentid="Properties", label="Physical disks: ".val | table id, parentid, label] | append[| inputlookup cisco_intersight_memory_units | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename Ancestors.Ancestors.Moid as ancestor_moid | mvexpand ancestor_moid | where ancestor_moid=replace("$servertok$", "SServer_", "") | stats count as val | eval id="Properties_".random(), parentid="Properties", label="Memory Modules: ".val | table id, parentid, label] | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_compute_physicalsummaries | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | where Moid=replace("$servertok$", "SServer_", "") | eval key_value_pairs=mvzip('Tags.Tags.Key','Tags.Tags.Value',"::") | mvexpand key_value_pairs | rex field=key_value_pairs "(?<Key>[^:]+)::(?<Value>.*)" | table Key, Value | search Key="*License*" | eval id="Properties_".random(), parentid="Properties", label="License Tier: ".Value | table id, parentid, label] | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_graphics_cards | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename Ancestors.Ancestors.Moid as ancestor_moid | mvexpand ancestor_moid | where ancestor_moid=replace("$servertok$", "SServer_", "") | stats count as val | eval id="Properties_".random(), parentid="Properties", label="GPU cards: ".val | table id, parentid, label]

| inputlookup cisco_intersight_network_elements | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | where Moid=replace("$fitok$", "FFI_", "") | rename RegisteredDevice.Moid as rd_moid, Owners.Owners as owners, RegisteredDevice.DeviceHostname as rd_dhn | table rd_moid, AccountMoid, owners, rd_dhn, Moid | mvexpand owners | where AccountMoid != owners | eval id=Moid, label=rd_dhn, parentid="", iconFolder="teeth" | dedup id | table id, label, parentid, iconFolder | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_network_elements | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | where Moid=replace("$fitok$", "FFI_", "") | eval id=Moid."_".AccountMoid, label="Properties", parentid=Moid | dedup id | table id, label, parentid ] | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_network_elements | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | where Moid=replace("$fitok$", "FFI_", "") | eval id="ESMode_".Moid, label="Ethernet Switching Mode: ".EthernetSwitchingMode, parentid=Moid."_".AccountMoid | dedup id | table id, label, parentid] | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_network_elements | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | where Moid=replace("$fitok$", "FFI_", "") | eval id="FSMode_".Moid, label="FC Switching Mode: ".FcSwitchingMode, parentid=Moid."_".AccountMoid | dedup id | table id, label, parentid] | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_network_elements | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | where Moid=replace("$fitok$", "FFI_", "") | eval id="AEMode_".Moid, label="Admin Evacuation Mode: ".AdminEvacState, parentid=Moid."_".AccountMoid | dedup id | table id, label, parentid] | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_network_elements | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | where Moid=replace("$fitok$", "FFI_", "") | eval id="IPA_".Moid, label="IP Address: ".OutOfBandIpAddress, parentid=Moid."_".AccountMoid | dedup id | table id, label, parentid] | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_network_elements | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | where Moid=replace("$fitok$", "FFI_", "") | eval id="SNM_".Moid, label="Subnet Mask: ".OutOfBandIpMask, parentid=Moid."_".AccountMoid | dedup id | table id, label, parentid] | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_network_elements | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | where Moid=replace("$fitok$", "FFI_", "") | eval id="DG_".Moid, label="Default Gateway: ".OutOfBandIpGateway, parentid=Moid."_".AccountMoid | dedup id | table id, label, parentid] | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_network_elements | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | where Moid=replace("$fitok$", "FFI_", "") | eval id="OBM_".Moid, label="MAC: ".OutOfBandMac, parentid=Moid."_".AccountMoid | dedup id | table id, label, parentid] | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_asset_devicecontractinformations | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename Source.Moid as moid | where moid=replace("$fitok$", "FFI_", "") | eval id="CS_".moid, label="Contract Status: ".ContractStatus, parentid=moid."_".AccountMoid | dedup id | table id, label, parentid] | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_asset_devicecontractinformations | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename Source.Moid as moid | where moid=replace("$fitok$", "FFI_", "") | eval id="LDOS_".moid, label="Last Date Of Support: ".LastDateOfSupport, parentid=moid."_".AccountMoid | dedup id | table id, label, parentid]

html.p: Click to Show the Related Panels ($devtyptok$: "$tv_label_token$")

panel.title: List of Active Physical disks of a Server

search.query: | inputlookup cisco_intersight_storage_physicaldisks | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | eval objid=split("$devtok$", "_") | eval objid = mvindex(objid, 1) | rename Ancestors.Ancestors.Moid as server_moid | mvexpand server_moid | where server_moid=objid | dedup Moid | eval Name="Disk ".DiskId, "Part Number"=PartNumber, "Drive State"=DriveState, "Size (MiB)"=Size | table Name, "Size (MiB)", Pid, "Part Number", Serial, Vendor, Protocol, Type, "Drive State", Description, Dn

`cisco_intersight_index` sourcetype="cisco:intersight:alarms" | eval objid=split("$devtok$", "_") | eval objid = mvindex(objid, 1) | where AffectedMoId=objid OR AncestorMoId=objid | stats count by Severity

`cisco_intersight_index` sourcetype="cisco:intersight:metrics" source="cpu_utilization" | eval serverid=replace("$servertok$", "SServer_", "") | rename event.HostId as event_hostid | rex field=event_hostid "(?<element_id>[^/]+)$" | where element_id=serverid | timechart latest($cpumetrictype$) as "CPU Utilization" span=15m

`cisco_intersight_index` sourcetype="cisco:intersight:metrics" source="temperature" | eval serverid=replace("$servertok$", "SServer_", "") | rename event.id as event_id | rex field=event_id "(?<element_id>[^/]+)$" | where element_id=serverid | timechart latest($tempmetrictype$) as "Temperature" by event.Name span=15m

`cisco_intersight_index` sourcetype="cisco:intersight:metrics" source="host" | eval serverid=replace("$servertok$", "SServer_", "") | rename event.HostId as event_hostid | rex field=event_hostid "(?<element_id>[^/]+)$" | where element_id=serverid | timechart latest($hostpowermetrictype$) as "Host Power" span=15m

`cisco_intersight_index` sourcetype="cisco:intersight:metrics" source="host" | eval serverid=replace("$servertok$", "SServer_", "") | rename event.HostId as event_hostid | rex field=event_hostid "(?<element_id>[^/]+)$" | where element_id=serverid | timechart span=15m latest($hostenergymetrictype$) as "Host Energy"

`cisco_intersight_index` sourcetype="cisco:intersight:metrics" source="fan" | eval serverid=replace("$servertok$", "SServer_", "") | rename event.HostId as event_hostid | rex field=event_hostid "(?<element_id>[^/]+)$" | where element_id=serverid | timechart span=15m latest($fanspeedmetrictype$) as "Fan Speed" by event.Name

`cisco_intersight_index` sourcetype="cisco:intersight:metrics" source="temperature" | eval fiid=replace("$fitok$", "FFI_", "") | rename event.id as event_id | rex field=event_id "(?<element_id>[^/]+)$" | where element_id=fiid | timechart span=15m latest($ftempmetrictype$) as Temperature by event.Name

`cisco_intersight_index` sourcetype="cisco:intersight:metrics" source="fan" | eval fiid=replace("$fitok$", "FFI_", "") | rename event.HostId as event_hostid | rex field=event_hostid "(?<element_id>[^/]+)$" | where element_id=fiid | timechart span=15m latest($ffanspeedmetrictype$) by event.Name

`cisco_intersight_index` sourcetype="cisco:intersight:metrics" source="host" | eval fiid=replace("$fitok$", "FFI_", "") | rename event.HostId as event_hostid | rex field=event_hostid "(?<element_id>[^/]+)$" | where element_id=fiid | timechart span=15m latest($fhostpowermetrictype$) as "Host Power"

`cisco_intersight_index` sourcetype="cisco:intersight:metrics" source="host" | eval fiid=replace("$fitok$", "FFI_", "") | rename event.HostId as event_hostid | rex field=event_hostid "(?<element_id>[^/]+)$" | where element_id=fiid | timechart span=15m latest($fhostenergymetrictype$)

`cisco_intersight_index` sourcetype="cisco:intersight:metrics" source="fan" | eval chassisid=replace("$chassistok$", "CChassis_", "") | rename event.HostId as event_hostid | rex field=event_hostid "(?<element_id>[^/]+)$" | where element_id=chassisid | timechart span=15m latest($cfanspeedmetrictype$) by event.Name limit=0

`cisco_intersight_index` sourcetype="cisco:intersight:auditrecords" "HttpResponsePayload.Server.Moid"="*" | rename HttpResponsePayload.Server.Moid as serverid | eval objid=split("$servertok$", "_") | eval objid = mvindex(objid, 1) | where serverid=objid | table Email, MoType, MoDisplayNames.Name{}, Event, updated_at, Moid | rename Moid as _moid, Email as "Updated By", updated_at as "Last Updated at", MoType as "Affected Object Type", MoDisplayNames.Name{} as "Affected Object Name", Event as "Event Type" | fillnull value="NULL"

| inputlookup cisco_intersight_tam_advisoryinstances | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename Owners.Owners as owners | mvexpand owners | search owners IN (*) AND account_name IN (*) | table AccountMoid, account_name, Moid, Advisory.Moid, AffectedObject.Moid | rename Moid as InstanceMoid, Advisory.Moid as Advisory_Moid, AffectedObject.Moid as objectmoid | eval objid=split("$devtok$", "_") | eval objid = mvindex(objid, 1) | where objectmoid=objid | dedup InstanceMoid | join type=left Advisory_Moid [ | inputlookup cisco_intersight_tam_advisoryinfos | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | table State, Advisory.Moid | rename Advisory.Moid as Advisory_Moid ] | join type=left Advisory_Moid [ | inputlookup cisco_intersight_tam_securityadvisories | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | table Moid, Name, Description, Recommendation, Severity.Level, ModTime, Type | rename Moid as Advisory_Moid, ModTime as "Last Updated At", Severity.Level as Severity | eval "AdvisoryType" = "Security Advisory" ] | rename Advisory_Moid as _Advisory_Moid, AccountMoid as _AccountMoid, InstanceMoid as _InstanceMoid, account_name as "Account Name" | eval Type=case(Type="eolAdvisory", "End Of Life Advisories", Type="fieldNotice", "Field Notices", AdvisoryType="Security Advisory", "Security Advisories") | search Type="Security Advisories" | stats count by Type, objectmoid | rename Type as _type, objectmoid as _objectmoid

| inputlookup cisco_intersight_tam_advisoryinstances | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename Owners.Owners as owners | mvexpand owners | search owners IN (*) AND account_name IN (*) | table AccountMoid, account_name, Moid, Advisory.Moid, AffectedObject.Moid | rename Moid as InstanceMoid, Advisory.Moid as Advisory_Moid, AffectedObject.Moid as objectmoid | eval objid=split("$devtok$", "_") | eval objid = mvindex(objid, 1) | where objectmoid=objid | dedup InstanceMoid | join type=left Advisory_Moid [ | inputlookup cisco_intersight_tam_advisoryinfos | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | table State, Advisory.Moid | rename Advisory.Moid as Advisory_Moid ] | join type=left Advisory_Moid [ | inputlookup cisco_intersight_tam_advisorydefinitions | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | table Moid, Name, Description, Recommendation, Severity.Level, ModTime, Type | rename Moid as Advisory_Moid, ModTime as "Last Updated At", Severity.Level as Severity | eval "AdvisoryType" = "Advisory Definition" ] | rename Advisory_Moid as _Advisory_Moid, AccountMoid as _AccountMoid, InstanceMoid as _InstanceMoid, account_name as "Account Name" | eval Type=case(Type="eolAdvisory", "End Of Life Advisories", Type="fieldNotice", "Field Notices", AdvisoryType="Security Advisory", "Security Advisories") | search Type="Field Notices" | stats count by Type, objectmoid | rename Type as _type, objectmoid as _objectmoid

| inputlookup cisco_intersight_tam_advisoryinstances | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename Owners.Owners as owners | mvexpand owners | search owners IN (*) AND account_name IN (*) | table AccountMoid, account_name, Moid, Advisory.Moid, AffectedObject.Moid | rename Moid as InstanceMoid, Advisory.Moid as Advisory_Moid, AffectedObject.Moid as objectmoid | eval objid=split("$devtok$", "_") | eval objid = mvindex(objid, 1) | where objectmoid=objid | dedup InstanceMoid | join type=left Advisory_Moid [ | inputlookup cisco_intersight_tam_advisoryinfos | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | table State, Advisory.Moid | rename Advisory.Moid as Advisory_Moid ] | join type=left Advisory_Moid [ | inputlookup cisco_intersight_tam_advisorydefinitions | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | table Moid, Name, Description, Recommendation, Severity.Level, ModTime, Type | rename Moid as Advisory_Moid, ModTime as "Last Updated At", Severity.Level as Severity | eval "AdvisoryType" = "Advisory Definition" ] | rename Advisory_Moid as _Advisory_Moid, AccountMoid as _AccountMoid, InstanceMoid as _InstanceMoid, account_name as "Account Name" | eval Type=case(Type="eolAdvisory", "End Of Life Advisories", Type="fieldNotice", "Field Notices", AdvisoryType="Security Advisory", "Security Advisories") | search Type="End Of Life Advisories" | stats count by Type, objectmoid | rename Type as _type, objectmoid as _objectmoid

| inputlookup cisco_intersight_tam_advisoryinstances | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | table AccountMoid, account_name, Moid, AffectedObject.ObjectType, AffectedObject.Name, AffectedObject.PlatformType, Advisory.Moid, AffectedObject.Moid | rename Moid as InstanceMoid, AffectedObject.ObjectType as "Affected Object Type", AffectedObject.Name as "Affected Object", AffectedObject.PlatformType as "Affected Object Platform Type", Advisory.Moid as Advisory_Moid, AffectedObject.Moid as AffectedObject_Moid | eval objid="$devid$" | where AffectedObject_Moid=objid | join type=left AffectedObject_Moid [ | inputlookup cisco_intersight_compute_physicalsummaries | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename Moid as AffectedObject_Moid, Name as "Affected Object" | table "Affected Object", AffectedObject_Moid | append [ | inputlookup cisco_intersight_equipment_chasses | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename Moid as AffectedObject_Moid, Name as "Affected Object" | table "Affected Object", AffectedObject_Moid ] | append [ | inputlookup cisco_intersight_network_elements | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename Moid as AffectedObject_Moid, SwitchProfileName as "Affected Object" | table "Affected Object", AffectedObject_Moid ] ] | join type=left Advisory_Moid [ | inputlookup cisco_intersight_tam_advisoryinfos | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | table State, Advisory.Moid | rename Advisory.Moid as Advisory_Moid ] | join type=left Advisory_Moid [ | inputlookup cisco_intersight_tam_advisorydefinitions | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | table Moid, Name, Description, Recommendation, Severity.Level, ModTime, Type | rename Moid as Advisory_Moid, ModTime as "Last Updated At", Severity.Level as Severity | eval "AdvisoryType" = "Advisory Definition" | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_tam_securityadvisories | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | table Moid, Name, Description, Recommendation, Severity.Level, ModTime, Type | rename Moid as Advisory_Moid, ModTime as "Last Updated At", Severity.Level as Severity | eval "AdvisoryType" = "Security Advisory"]] | rename Advisory_Moid as _Advisory_Moid, AccountMoid as _AccountMoid, InstanceMoid as _InstanceMoid, account_name as "Account Name" | eval Type=case(Type="eolAdvisory", "End Of Life Advisories", Type="fieldNotice", "Field Notices", AdvisoryType="Security Advisory", "Security Advisories") | eval _advtyp="$advtyp$" | where Type=_advtyp | table Name, Type, "Affected Object", "Affected Object Platform Type", Severity, State, "Last Updated At" | sort Severity

| inputlookup cisco_intersight_adapter_hostethinterfaces | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | stats count by OperState | where OperState!="" AND !isnull(OperState) | table OperState | eval val=OperState

| inputlookup cisco_intersight_adapter_hostethinterfaces | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename AdapterUnit.ComputeRackUnit.Moid as id, Vethernet.PinnedInterface.PortId as PortId, Vethernet.PinnedInterface.SlotId as SlotId, AdapterUnit.ExtEthIfs.PortChannelId as PortChannelId, AdapterUnit.ExtEthIfs.SwitchId as Fabric | where id=replace("$servertok$", "SServer_", "") | eval "FI Uplink Interface"=SlotId."/".PortId, "FI Server Interface"="PC-".PortChannelId, IOMHostInterfaces="PC-".IOMHostInterfaces | table Name, AdapterUnit.Serial, AdapterUnit.AdapterId, Fabric, MacAddress, QinqVlan, VifId, OperState, ActiveOperState, StandbyVifId, StandbyOperState, IOMHostInterfaces, "FI Uplink Interface", "FI Server Interface", Dn | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_adapter_hostethinterfaces | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename AdapterUnit.ComputeBlade.Moid as id, Vethernet.PinnedInterface.PortId as PortId, Vethernet.PinnedInterface.SlotId as SlotId, AdapterUnit.ExtEthIfs.PortChannelId as PortChannelId, Vethernet.NetworkElement.SwitchId as Fabric | where id=replace("$servertok$", "SServer_", "") | eval "FI Uplink Interface"=SlotId."/".PortId, IOMHostInterfaces="PC-".IOMHostInterfaces | table AdapterUnit.AdapterId, ActiveOperState, AdapterUnit.Serial, Name, Fabric, MacAddress, VifId, OperState, QinqVlan, StandbyVifId, StandbyOperState, IOMHostInterfaces, "FI Uplink Interface", "FI Server Interface", Dn] | search OperState="$srvoperstate$"

| inputlookup cisco_intersight_ether_hostports | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | stats count by OperState | table OperState | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_ether_networkports | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | stats count by OperState | table OperState] | dedup OperState | eval val=OperState

| inputlookup cisco_intersight_ether_hostports | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename Ancestors.Ancestors.Moid as id | mvexpand id | where id=replace("$chassistok$", "CChassis_", "") | eval PortType="Backplane Port", Id="1/".SlotId."/".PortId | table Id, PortType, Role, OperState, OperSpeed, PortChannelId, OperStateQual, SwitchId, Mode, ModuleId, SlotId, PortId, Dn | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_ether_networkports | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename Ancestors.Ancestors.Moid as id | mvexpand id | where id=replace("$chassistok$", "CChassis_", "") | eval PortType="Fabric Port", Id=SlotId."/".PortId | table PortType, SwitchId, PortId, OperState, SlotId, ModuleId, Id, Dn] | search PortType="$chporttype$" AND OperState="$choperstate$"

| inputlookup cisco_intersight_ether_physicalports | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | stats count by OperState | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_fc_physicalports | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | stats count by OperState] | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_ether_portchannels | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | stats count by OperState] | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_fc_portchannels | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | stats count by OperState] | table OperState | dedup OperState | eval val=OperState

table.title: List of Ports and Port Channels for FI

search.query: | inputlookup cisco_intersight_ether_physicalports | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename Ancestors.Ancestors.Moid as id | mvexpand id | where id=replace("$fitok$", "FFI_", "") | eval Name="Port ".SlotId."/".PortId, PortType="Ethernet" | table Name, PortType, MacAddress, Role, AdminState, AdminSpeed, OperState, OperSpeed, OperStateQual, PortChannelId, PortId, SlotId, SwitchId, AggregatePortId, MacAddress, Mode, Dn | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_fc_physicalports | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename Ancestors.Ancestors.Moid as id | mvexpand id | where id=replace("$fitok$", "FFI_", "") | eval Name="Port ".SlotId."/".PortId, PortType="FC" | table AdminState, AdminSpeed, AggregatePortId, Dn, Mode, Name, OperState, OperSpeed, OperStateQual, PortChannelId, PortId, PortType, Role, SlotId, SwitchId, Wwn] | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_ether_portchannels | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename Ancestors.Ancestors.Moid as id | mvexpand id | where id=replace("$fitok$", "FFI_", "") | where Role!="unknown" AND Role!="HostPC" | eval Name=case(Role="Server", "Server Port Channel ".PortChannelId, Role="FabricPc", "Fabric Port Channel ".PortChannelId, true(), Name), Role=case(Role="Server", "Server Port Channel ", Role="FabricPc", "Fabric Port Channel ", true(), Role), PortType="Ethernet Port Channel" | table AdminState, BandWidth, Dn, MacAddress, Mode, Name, OperSpeed, OperState, OperStateQual, PortChannelId, PortType, Role, SwitchId] | append [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_fc_portchannels | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename Ancestors.Ancestors.Moid as id | mvexpand id | where id=replace("$fitok$", "FFI_", "") | eval PortType="FC Port Channel", Name=case(Role="FcUplinkPc", "FC Uplink Port Channel ".PortChannelId, true(), Name), Role=case(Role="FcUplinkPc", "FC Uplink Port Channel", true(), Role) | table AdminSpeed, AdminState, Mode, Name, OperSpeed, OperState, OperStateQual, PortChannelId, PortType, Role, SwitchId, Dn] | search PortType="$fiporttype$" AND OperState="$fioperstate$"

| inputlookup cisco_intersight_processor_units | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename Ancestors.Ancestors.Moid as id, IsUpgraded as Upgraded, IsPlatformSupported as "Platform Supported" | mvexpand id | where id=replace("$servertok$", "SServer_", "") | eval Name="Processor ".ProcessorId | table ProcessorId, Name, Description, OperState, Model, Architecture, "Platform Supported", Upgraded, Pid, PartNumber, NumCores, NumCoresEnabled, NumThreads, Vendor, Dn

| inputlookup cisco_intersight_memory_units | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename Ancestors.Ancestors.Moid as id, IsUpgraded as Upgraded, IsPlatformSupported as "Platform Supported" | mvexpand id | where id=replace("$servertok$", "SServer_", "") AND Presence="equipped" | rename Location as Name | table MemoryId, Name, Description, OperState, Model, Type, FormFactor, Serial, Clock, Capacity, ArrayId, Upgraded, "Platform Supported", PartNumber, Pid, Presence, Visiblity, Width, Set, Vendor, Dn

| inputlookup cisco_intersight_equipment_psus | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename Parent.Moid as id, IsUpgraded as Upgraded | eval objid=split("$devtok$", "_") | eval objid = mvindex(objid, 1) | where id=objid AND Presence="equipped" | eval Name="PSU ".PsuId | table PsuId, Name, Description, OperState, Model, Serial, Upgraded, Presence, PartNumber, Pid, PsuInputSrc, PsuType, PsuFwVersion, PsuWattage, Vid, Voltage, Sku, SpareStatus, Vendor, Dn

| inputlookup cisco_intersight_equipment_fanmodules | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename Parent.Moid as id, Parent.ObjectType as obtyp, Moid as _moid, IsUpgraded as Upgraded | eval objid=split("$devtok$", "_") | eval objid = mvindex(objid, 1) | where id=objid | eval Name="Fan Module ".ModuleId | table ModuleId, Name, Description, OperState, Model, Serial, Upgraded, PartNumber, Pid, Presence, Sku, TrayId, Vid, Vendor, Dn, _moid

| inputlookup cisco_intersight_equipment_fans | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename Parent.Moid as id, IsUpgraded as Upgraded | mvexpand id | where id="$fanmoduleid$" and Presence="equipped" | table ModuleId, FanId, Model, OperState, Upgraded, PartNumber, Pid, Presence, TrayId, Vid, Vendor, Dn
